# Coach Luki — Personal Trainer & Nutritionist in Berlin

> Coach Luki (Luke Satterly) is a certified personal trainer and nutritionist based in Berlin, Germany. He offers in-person personal training at John Reed Bötzow in Prenzlauer Berg and McFit locations across Berlin, plus online coaching worldwide. Specialties include strength training, calisthenics, gymnastic ring training, body recomposition, and plant-based (vegan) nutrition. Coaching is bilingual in English and German.

## Services

- [Essentials — In-Person Training](https://coachluki.com/start): 4 in-person personal training sessions per month with custom programming and nutrition guidance. €240 per month.
- [All In — Premium Personal Training](https://coachluki.com/start): 8 in-person personal training sessions per month with full nutrition coaching, weekly check-ins, and WhatsApp support. €480 per month.
- Online Coaching: Custom programs, accountability, and ongoing adjustments for clients anywhere in the world.

## Specialties

- Strength training and progressive overload programming
- Calisthenics and gymnastic ring training
- Body recomposition and lean muscle building
- Plant-based / vegan sports nutrition
- Injury prevention and return-to-training after pain or injury
- Bilingual coaching: English and German (Deutsch)

## Locations

- John Reed Bötzow — Bötzowstraße, 10407 Berlin (Prenzlauer Berg) — primary in-person location
- McFit Berlin — multiple locations across the city
- Online — clients worldwide

## Real Client Results

- **Hayley** — 6 months: Body recomposition and strength gains
- **Diren** — 8 months: Lean muscle build and fat loss
- **James** — 1 year: Body recomposition and visible muscle definition

Full transformation photos and 8 written client reviews (5-star average) are on the home page.

## Why Coach Luki

- Plant-based athlete coaching plant-based athletes — vegan nutrition is a personal specialty, not an afterthought
- Programs built around real life and real schedules, not gym-rat assumptions
- Long-term sustainable results focus over quick fixes
- Strong technique and injury-prevention emphasis
- Available in person in Berlin and online globally

## Frequently Asked Questions

- **Is personal training right for me?** Yes if you want a clear plan, structure, and measurable progress. Most people don't struggle because they're lazy — they're guessing. Coaching removes the guesswork.
- **Is online coaching effective?** Yes when done properly — structured programming with regular adjustments based on your progress integrates better into real life than fixed appointments do.
- **Why use a coach instead of training alone?** Results come from consistency and direction. A coach gives structure, accountability, and ensures every session moves you toward your goal.
- **Vegan-friendly?** Yes — Luke is vegan. Plant-based protein targets, meal optimization, and sustainable approaches are a core specialty.
- **Languages?** English and German.
- **Gyms?** Primary base is John Reed Bötzow in Prenzlauer Berg. Also trains clients at McFit locations across Berlin.
